title: noccaea tymphaea
intro: Noccaea tymphaea, also known as alpine penny-cress, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming Noccaea tymphaea may provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy. Noccaea tymphaea can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water, or by using it as a tincture in combination with other herbs.
